infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HaulWallet uses your location to suggest nearby cities and calculate routes from your current position.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: HaulWallet tracks your location in the background to automatically record miles per state for your IFTA quarterly fuel tax report.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: HaulWallet tracks your location in the background to automatically record miles per state for your IFTA quarterly fuel tax report.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HaulWallet uses the camera to scan fuel receipts for OCR processing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HaulWallet accesses your photo library to scan saved fuel receipts.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: HaulWallet tracks your location in the background to automatically record miles per state for your IFTA quarterly fuel tax report.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: HaulWallet tracks your location in the background to automatically record miles per state for your IFTA quarterly fuel tax report.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: HaulWallet uses your location to suggest nearby cities and calculate routes.

plugins.photosPermission: HaulWallet accesses your photos to scan saved fuel receipts.
